svg.text: AI Intelligence | Traditional ROS2 Logic | Manual Remote Control - Choose Your Mode

g.text: Web App | Mobile | Joystick via ESP32
Outputs: Direct motor control to Arduino
• Speed slider, steering dial, mode switch
• Tilt phone to steer, swipe for speed
• Left stick: steering | Right trigger: throttle
Best for: Precise control, low latency (<10ms)
🔌 HARDWARE ABSTRACTION LAYER (HAL) - Shared by ALL 3 Modes
💡 HAL unified interface: AI reads raw data | ROS2 uses topics | Manual bypasses all processing | All atomic & independent
Serial UART (115200 baud) | Custom binary protocol
🟡 M2/M3 - Enhanced (SLAM, Vision, Planning, Mobile App)
🔴 M4+ - Future (Lane detection, AI tuning, Advanced UI)
✓ Tri-Mode: AI API | ROS2 Logic | Manual Control - runtime selectable
✓ Modularity: Each node atomic, can be stubbed without breaking system
✓ Safety-First: Independent watchdog, hardware E-stop, all modes monitored
✓ Flexibility: Switch modes on-the-fly via web/app interface
✓ User Control: Full manual override available at all times
